name: ScIdsMadorMbrLoad

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT * FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ScIdsMadorMbrLoad_TMP) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR AS T USING (SELECT * FROM cte) AS S ON (T.MBR_MA_DOR_SK = S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MBR_ID = S.MBR_ID, T.SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID, T.GRP_ID = S.GRP_ID, T.TAX_YR = S.TAX_YR, T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.AS_OF_DTM = S.AS_OF_DTM, T.GRP_SK = S.GRP_SK, T.MBR_SK = S.MBR_SK, T.SUB_MA_DOR_SK = S.SUB_MA_DOR_SK, T.SUB_SK = S.SUB_SK, T.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK = S.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, T.MBR_FIRST_NM = S.MBR_FIRST_NM, T.MBR_MIDINIT = S.MBR_MIDINIT, T.MBR_LAST_NM = S.MBR_LAST_NM, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, T.JAN_COV_IN = S.JAN_COV_IN, T.FEB_COV_IN = S.FEB_COV_IN, T.MAR_COV_IN = S.MAR_COV_IN, T.APR_COV_IN = S.APR_COV_IN, T.MAY_COV_IN = S.MAY_COV_IN, T.JUN_COV_IN = S.JUN_COV_IN, T.JUL_COV_IN = S.JUL_COV_IN, T.AUG_COV_IN = S.AUG_COV_IN, T.SEP_COV_IN = S.SEP_COV_IN, T.OCT_COV_IN = S.OCT_COV_IN, T.NOV_COV_IN = S.NOV_COV_IN, T.DEC_COV_IN = S.DEC_COV_IN, T.MBR_BRTH_DT = S.MBR_BRTH_DT, T.MBR_SFX_NO = S.MBR_SFX_NO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MBR_MA_DOR_SK, MBR_ID, SUB_ID, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_SK, MBR_SK, SUB_MA_DOR_SK, SUB_SK, MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, MBR_FIRST_NM, MBR_MIDINIT, MBR_LAST_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, JAN_COV_IN, FEB_COV_IN, MAR_COV_IN, APR_COV_IN, MAY_COV_IN, JUN_COV_IN, JUL_COV_IN, AUG_COV_IN, SEP_COV_IN, OCT_COV_IN, NOV_COV_IN, DEC_COV_IN, MBR_BRTH_DT, MBR_SFX_NO) VALUES (S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK, S.MBR_ID, S.SUB_ID, S.GRP_ID, S.TAX_YR, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.AS_OF_DTM, S.GRP_SK, S.MBR_SK, S.SUB_MA_DOR_SK, S.SUB_SK, S.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, S.MBR_FIRST_NM, S.MBR_MIDINIT, S.MBR_LAST_NM, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, S.JAN_COV_IN, S.FEB_COV_IN, S.MAR_COV_IN, S.APR_COV_IN, S.MAY_COV_IN, S.JUN_COV_IN, S.JUL_COV_IN, S.AUG_COV_IN, S.SEP_COV_IN, S.OCT_COV_IN, S.NOV_COV_IN, S.DEC_COV_IN, S.MBR_BRTH_DT, S.MBR_SFX_NO); MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_HIST AS T USING (SELECT MBR_MA_DOR_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.AsOfDtm}' AS AS_OF_DTM, MBR_ID, SUB_ID, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, GRP_SK, MBR_SK, SUB_MA_DOR_SK, SUB_SK, MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, MBR_FIRST_NM, MBR_MIDINIT, MBR_LAST_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, JAN_COV_IN, FEB_COV_IN, MAR_COV_IN, APR_COV_IN, MAY_COV_IN, JUN_COV_IN, JUL_COV_IN, AUG_COV_IN, SEP_COV_IN, OCT_COV_IN, NOV_COV_IN, DEC_COV_IN, MBR_BRTH_DT, MBR_SFX_NO FROM cte) AS S ON (T.MBR_MA_DOR_SK = S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK AND T.AS_OF_DTM = S.AS_OF_DTM) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.MBR_ID = S.MBR_ID, T.SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID, T.GRP_ID = S.GRP_ID, T.TAX_YR = S.TAX_YR, T.SRC_SYS_CD = S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.GRP_SK = S.GRP_SK, T.MBR_SK = S.MBR_SK, T.SUB_MA_DOR_SK = S.SUB_MA_DOR_SK, T.SUB_SK = S.SUB_SK, T.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK = S.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, T.MBR_FIRST_NM = S.MBR_FIRST_NM, T.MBR_MIDINIT = S.MBR_MIDINIT, T.MBR_LAST_NM = S.MBR_LAST_NM, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, T.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 = S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, T.JAN_COV_IN = S.JAN_COV_IN, T.FEB_COV_IN = S.FEB_COV_IN, T.MAR_COV_IN = S.MAR_COV_IN, T.APR_COV_IN = S.APR_COV_IN, T.MAY_COV_IN = S.MAY_COV_IN, T.JUN_COV_IN = S.JUN_COV_IN, T.JUL_COV_IN = S.JUL_COV_IN, T.AUG_COV_IN = S.AUG_COV_IN, T.SEP_COV_IN = S.SEP_COV_IN, T.OCT_COV_IN = S.OCT_COV_IN, T.NOV_COV_IN = S.NOV_COV_IN, T.DEC_COV_IN = S.DEC_COV_IN, T.MBR_BRTH_DT = S.MBR_BRTH_DT, T.MBR_SFX_NO = S.MBR_SFX_NO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MBR_MA_DOR_SK, AS_OF_DTM, MBR_ID, SUB_ID, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, GRP_SK, MBR_SK, SUB_MA_DOR_SK, SUB_SK, MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, MBR_FIRST_NM, MBR_MIDINIT, MBR_LAST_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, JAN_COV_IN, FEB_COV_IN, MAR_COV_IN, APR_COV_IN, MAY_COV_IN, JUN_COV_IN, JUL_COV_IN, AUG_COV_IN, SEP_COV_IN, OCT_COV_IN, NOV_COV_IN, DEC_COV_IN, MBR_BRTH_DT, MBR_SFX_NO) VALUES (S.MBR_MA_DOR_SK, S.AS_OF_DTM, S.MBR_ID, S.SUB_ID, S.GRP_ID, S.TAX_YR, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.GRP_SK, S.MBR_SK, S.SUB_MA_DOR_SK, S.SUB_SK, S.MBR_RELSHP_CD_SK, S.MBR_FIRST_NM, S.MBR_MIDINIT, S.MBR_LAST_NM, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_LN_3, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, S.MBR_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, S.JAN_COV_IN, S.FEB_COV_IN, S.MAR_COV_IN, S.APR_COV_IN, S.MAY_COV_IN, S.JUN_COV_IN, S.JUL_COV_IN, S.AUG_COV_IN, S.SEP_COV_IN, S.OCT_COV_IN, S.NOV_COV_IN, S.DEC_COV_IN, S.MBR_BRTH_DT, S.MBR_SFX_NO);
